hard_rule: One archive/category is always a 30-day cycle. A group is not 30 days; group route duration equals archive_count * 30 days.
date_rule_for_notion_timeline: Only currently active groups default to the program start date. Queued group dates must be computed from active-slot promotion rules or explicit project state; never default every queued group to today.
learning_note_language_rule: Learning notes, daily logs, reviews, and Notion note content must be Chinese by default. Keep English only for unavoidable professional terms, API names, paper/category codes, exact source titles, and tool names.
daily_session_header_rule: Every arXiv daily session must first state Global Day, both active Groups, current Archive codes/names, and Archive Day out of 30.

active_tracks.last_lesson_status: D001 partial validated on 2026-06-14. User understands executable price needs spread/slippage/fees/tax quantified, but terminology must be corrected:成交价 is executed price; reference/expected price differs from executable total cost.

D001 partial validated on 2026-06-14. User understands object/method/tool affect result, but needs reinforcement: measurement selects observable/information boundary; it does not arbitrarily decide reality.

promotion_rule: Two active slots are maintained. When an active group completes, the next queued group in group_order starts the next calendar day in the freed slot. Do not assign queued group start dates before promotion unless the queue simulation already determines them.

last_learning_session.reason: User provided self-recall. Q-FIN is directionally correct with terminology correction needed; PHYS measurement concept requires deeper filter/information-boundary explanation.

next_action: Start D002 with a 3-minute recall check, then teach q-fin.TR order types and quant-ph state model. Reinforce measurement as filter/observable selection, not arbitrary result creation.
